3017800.name: Catacombs
3017800.description:
Seize control of ancient Egyptian enemies while on a journey to the afterlife in Catacombs, a purr-ific action-strategy game!

Orange Cat Energy!

In Catacombs, you play as Tabby, an orange street cat on his way to visit a recently-passed friend in the afterlife. Unfortunately, Osiris himself forbade your entry to the underworld and ordered his minions to patrol its entrance.

Don’t let that stop you; venture deep into the catacombs, pouncing on and assuming control over supernatural minions, all while foiling the will of the gods with pure orange cat energy!

Plan...

Scout out your unsuspecting enemies before attacking and concoct a perfectly chaotic plan for annihilation.

Dodge...

Weave in and out of enemy sightlines and dodge projectiles. Careful--one hit and Tabby is knocked out!

Pounce!

Pounce on enemies' heads to take control over them, and use their own abilities to defeat your other foes and conquer the underworld!

  • The keen, precise jackal throws bones at staggering speeds!

  • The divine, spiritual falcon summons pillars of light to vaporize anything in its path!

  • The bulky, menacing mummy tanks multiple hits to pummel its enemies with nothing but its fists!

All of these powers are under your control with nothing but orange cat energy. How will you enact chaos on the Egyptian underworld?
3017800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
